name: Cajun Coleslaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mayonnaise and mustard in a bowl large enough to hold the mixture, but shallow enough to allow easy mixing.
2. Beat together until combined.
3. Slowly add olive oil while continuing to beat, ensuring smooth incorporation.
4. Add Louisiana hot sauce and continue beating until fully mixed.
5. Incorporate ketchup and keep beating.
6. Stir in garlic salt and vinegar (this will thin the sauce).
7. Beat thoroughly with lemon juice added gradually.
8. Toss shredded cabbage, peppers, and onions into a large salad bowl.
9. Pour the prepared dressing over the vegetables and mix well.
10. Allow the mixture to sit for at least an hour before serving; it improves in flavor the next day.
